title: vicia pseudo-orobus
intro: Vicia pseudo-orobus, also known as False Bitter Vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Vicia pseudo-orobus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
